requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (PED) applies to heat pump refrigerant circuits as pressure equipment. Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I (lowest risk) allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require involvement of a Notified Body. EN 378 also applies for system-level refrigerating system safety.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU（PED）将热泵制冷剂回路视为压力设备加以管理。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类（最低风险）允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。EN 378同样适用于系统级制冷系统安全。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（PED）將熱泵制冷劑迴路視為壓力設備加以管理。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類（最低風險）允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。EN 378同樣適用於系統級制冷系統安全。

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not a CE marking equivalent.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册并非CE标志的等效证明。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記並非CE標誌的等效證明。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body must be engaged. Refrigerant circuit re-design or re-certification to PED categories may be required.
gap.zh: PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）在PED下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入公告机构。制冷剂回路可能需要重新设计或按PED类别重新取证。
gap.zht: PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）在PED下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入公告機構。制冷劑迴路可能需要重新設計或按PED類別重新取證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED applies to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED.
compliance_verdict.zh: 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在PED下不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在PED下不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 System Safety Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——EN 378系统安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——EN 378系統安全要求

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits that meet its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020, EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019, EN 378-3:2016, and EN 378-4:2016 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps; applying them can support a presumption of conformity with relevant EU essential requirements, but the standards themselves are not mandatory.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关欧盟基本要求的符合性推定，但标准本身并非强制。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關歐盟基本要求的符合性推定，但標準本身並非強制。

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. The current revision status of GB/T 9237 should be verified at time of compliance assessment. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. GB 9237 does not cover the same scope of leak detection obligations as EN 378.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。GB/T 9237的当前修订状态应在合规评估时予以核查。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378不同。GB 9237未涵盖与EN 378同等范围的泄漏检测义务。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。GB/T 9237的當前修訂狀態應在合規評估時予以核查。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378不同。GB 9237未涵蓋與EN 378同等範圍的洩漏檢測義務。

gap.en: EU legal compliance must be assessed against PED where the refrigerant circuit falls within PED scope. EN 378 documentation, leak detection, and flammable refrigerant charge-limit methods differ from GB 9237, so using the voluntary EN 378 route may require a full system re-assessment, but an alternative technical solution may also be justified if it satisfies the mandatory EU requirements.
gap.zh: 若制冷剂回路落入PED范围，欧盟法律合规性必须按PED评估。EN 378的文件、泄漏检测和可燃制冷剂充注量限制方法与GB 9237不同，因此若选择自愿采用EN 378路径，可能需要进行完整系统重新评估；但也可采用其他技术方案，只要能证明满足强制性欧盟要求。
gap.zht: 若制冷劑迴路落入PED範圍，歐盟法律合規性必須按PED評估。EN 378的文件、洩漏檢測和可燃制冷劑充注量限制方法與GB 9237不同，因此若選擇自願採用EN 378路徑，可能需要進行完整系統重新評估；但也可採用其他技術方案，只要能證明滿足強制性歐盟要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; EN 378 is voluntary and may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 9237 under fire safety and product safety regime)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Gap — PED applicability must be classified first; EN 378 is a voluntary harmonised route to presumption of conformity, not a mandatory standard, and differs from GB 9237 in documentation, leak detection, and charge-limit methods.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距——须先判定PED适用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准路径，并非强制标准，且其文件、泄漏检测和充注量限制方法与GB 9237不同。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距——須先判定PED適用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準路徑，並非強制標準，且其文件、洩漏檢測和充注量限制方法與GB 9237不同。
